      • getSubstitutions

        static ImmutableSet<Substitution> getSubstitutions(Term trigger,
                                          Term targetTerm)
        matching trigger to targetTerm recursively
        Parameters:
        trigger - a uni-trigger
        targetTerm - a gound term
        Returns:
        all substitution found from this matching

      • match

        private static Substitution match(Term pattern,
                 Term instance)
        Parameters:
        pattern -
        instance -
        Returns:
        all substitution that a given pattern(ex: a term of a uniTrigger) match in the instance.

      • matchRec

        private static ImmutableMap<QuantifiableVariable,Term> matchRec(ImmutableMap<QuantifiableVariable,Term> varMap,

        match the pattern to instance recursively.

      • mapVarWithCheck

        private static ImmutableMap<QuantifiableVariable,Term> mapVarWithCheck(ImmutableMap<QuantifiableVariable,Term> varMap,
                                                      QuantifiableVariable var,
                                                      Term instance)
        match a variable to a instance.
        Returns:
        true if it is a new vaiable or the instance it matched is the same as that it matched before.
